headline: Toll Brothers Set to Report Q2 Earnings: Key Things to Watch
summary: TOL's Q2 results are likely to benefit from resilient luxury demand and pricing, but fewer deliveries and mix-driven margin pressure might temper results.

raw.headline: Toll Brothers Set to Report Q2 Earnings: Key Things to Watch

headline: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on PulteGroup Stock?
summary: While PulteGroup has underperformed the S&P 500 over the past 52 weeks, Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.
